adjudications.operator_decision: There are additional ship manufacturers beyond the three initially described.
adjudications.repository_action: Recognize ten evidenced root manufacturer families represented in the 63-row dataset, preserve Fimbul BYOS and Fimbul ECOS as sublines, and document Floyd Line as the eleventh official root manufacturer absent from the capture.

adjudications.operator_decision: The FTX exposure is a corroborated fact and public reporting may be used as evidence.
adjudications.repository_action: Treat material FTX exposure, the approximately halved operating runway, and the 2023 contraction as corroborated; retain audited loss, recovery, financing, and later staffing as unresolved.

adjudications.operator_decision: Current membership may be inferred when confidence is high.
adjudications.repository_action: Permit dated current-membership inference only from recent, convergent evidence; retain tag-only and historical evidence as association or historical membership.

adjudications.operator_decision: Accept the historical canonical-source snapshot treatment.
adjudications.repository_action: Continue treating the captured Jose Eduardo lore repository as a historical canonical-source snapshot for the represented in-universe taxonomy rather than proof of current taxonomy.
